scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build:desktop: cross-env VITE_BASE_PATH=./ npm --prefix frontend run build && electron-builder
